summaryAm: ሰው ያልደረሰበትን ነገር መናቅ እንዳይሆን የሚያስታውስ ታሪክ።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Use only public-domain source material. Create original Amharic adaptation.

pages.textAm: የቀበሮው እና የወይኑ ታሪክ በቅርቡ ይመጣል።
pages.textEn: The Fox and the Grapes story is coming soon.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A friendly fox sees grapes hanging from a leafy vine.

pages.textAm: ይህ ገጽ ሙከራን እና ትንሽ ብስጭትን ይዘጋጃል።
pages.textEn: This page will prepare the trying and disappointment moment.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The fox tries to reach grapes in a gentle, non-frightening scene.

pages.textEn: The story will show how to speak honestly about feelings.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The fox walks away thoughtfully through a warm vineyard path.
